article.body:
## Startup-Hub Auto Sync Notes

- Startup-Hub broker now watches `Obsidian\` directly inside the root workspace.
- This replaces the old separate Obsidian hidden runner path.
- Auto sync uses a quiet period, a minimum push interval, and a max batch window.
- Validated selective path staging through the broker on 2026-04-18.
- Detection probe at 18:07.
article.html:
Startup-Hub Auto Sync Notes

  • Startup-Hub broker now watches Obsidian\ directly inside the root workspace.
  • This replaces the old separate Obsidian hidden runner path.
  • Auto sync uses a quiet period, a minimum push interval, and a max batch window.
  • Validated selective path staging through the broker on 2026-04-18.
  • Detection probe at 18:07.
